data_quality_notes: Fertilizer consumption (kg/ha arable land, World Bank AG.CON.FERT.ZS, sourced from FAO). Pesticide-specific data (AG.CON.PEST.ZS) returned empty from World Bank API. Country-level aggregates lack spatial resolution for protected area catchment analysis. Pesticide-specific World Bank indicator (AG.CON.PEST.ZS) returned no data; fertilizer consumption used as sole proxy. Cross-sectional analysis (most recent year per country) used. GPC matched via nearest available year for partial correlation. Spatial mismatch between country-level aggregates and protected area catchments likely attenuates any true relationship.
summary: Tested fertilizer consumption intensity (World Bank AG.CON.FERT.ZS, kg/ha arable land) against SPI using 177 country observations. Pearson r=0.049 (p=0.521), Spearman rho=0.071 (p=0.350). Partial r=-0.008 (p=0.912) controlling for log(GPC). Best functional form: linear (linear R²=0.0024, log-linear R²=N/A, quadratic R²=0.0028). Hypothesis expected negative correlation (r=-0.55 to -0.70). Observed r=0.049 is near zero and not significant, failing to confirm the hypothesis. Country-level fertilizer aggregates likely too coarse to capture protected area catchment-specific impacts.
